set_fields.description: Test coverage for forge module.nn## Unit tests (test/forge-state.test.ts)n- State serialization/deserialization round-tripn- Phase transitions: implementing -> reviewing -> implementingn- Cycle increment on rejectn- Status transitions: active -> paused -> active, active -> completednn## Tool activation tests (test/forge-tools.test.ts)n- forge_done active only during IMPLEMENTINGn- forge_review active only during REVIEWINGn- Neither active when no forge runningn- forge_done returns error outside IMPLEMENTINGn- forge_review returns error outside REVIEWINGnn## Backlog interception tests (test/forge-interception.test.ts)n- Implementer blocked from closing forge taskn- Implementer allowed to close other tasksn- Implementer allowed to comment on forge taskn- No interception during REVIEWING phasen- No interception when forge inactivenn## DoDn- npm run gate passesn- Key flows covered
